old-text: Hi! I'm Hanif, a software engineer with about 2+ years of experience.
I love tinkering with new technologies. I believe every problem has a befitting solution, I just have to spend enough time to figure it out.
Fastest way to reach me is via X, and then my email above;
old-text-v2: Hi! I'm Hanif, a software engineer with about 2+ years of experience.
I build solutions I find useful. I am constantly bringing ideas to life, and learning new things along the way.
Fastest way to reach me is via X, and then my email above;
old-text-v3: Hello there! 👋 Welcome to my corner of the internet!

I wrote my first 'hello world' in 2016, and when I realised I could bring ideas to life, I felt like a superhero ever since. I spend most of my time working, and then a better part just building things I wished existed. (Tring to document more this year)
I build solutions I find useful. I am constantly bringing ideas to life, and learning new things along the way.
Fastest way to reach me is via X, and then my email above;
